list.vod_blurb: &nbsp;In a world where environmental collapse has left survivors to fight over the precious remainin
list.vod_content: In a world where environmental collapse has left survivors to fight over the precious remaining resources, a young woman's loyalties are tested by the arrival of a wounded man who discovers her family has a secret supply of freshwater.

list.vod_content: It tells the story of Jimmy (Saunders), a 42-year-old man-child whose life hasnâ€™t progressed since losing the election for senior class president 25 years prior to the now current Governor of Texas. Frustrated with his circumstances, Jimmy decides to re-enroll in high school and run for class president again. But once he leaves the safe confines of his dadâ€™s memorabilia store and attempts to join the TikTok-fueled pace of Gen Z, Jimmy quickly realizes he has a whole lot more to learn than just the proper use of gender pronouns.
